About Organization

The National Testing Agency (NTA) is responsible for conducting the NTA AIAPGET Admissions 2026.

For more information about the organization, please visit the NTA official website.


About the Programme

The NTA AIAPGET Admissions 2026 is an admission programme for MD/ MS/ PG Diploma courses in Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha & Homoeopathy.

The programme aims to provide opportunities for students to pursue higher education in these fields.
